hero.title: Global Payment Infrastructure
hero.subtitle: Accept crypto and fiat payments seamlessly across emerging markets
hero.description: Fluxapay lets merchants accept USDC payments on Stellar and get settled in local fiat with a Stripe-like API and no on-chain complexity.

whyFluxapay.title: Why FluxaPay?
whyFluxapay.subtitle: Built for the future of global commerce

instant.title: Instant Settlements
instant.description: Get paid in seconds, not days. Real-time settlement to your wallet.

lowFees.title: Low Transaction Fees
lowFees.description: Save up to 70% on payment processing fees compared to traditional providers.

global.title: Global Reach
global.description: Accept payments from anywhere in the world with multi-currency support.

secure.title: Bank-Grade Security
secure.description: Enterprise-level security with multi-signature wallets and encryption.

bridges.title: Bridging Traditional & Crypto
bridges.subtitle: Seamlessly connect fiat and cryptocurrency payments

crypto.title: Crypto Payments
crypto.description: Accept Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC, and more

settlement.title: Flexible Settlement
settlement.description: Choose how and when you get paid

ecommerce.title: E-Commerce
ecommerce.description: Accept payments on your online store with simple integration

marketplace.title: Marketplaces
marketplace.description: Split payments between multiple vendors automatically

subscription.title: Subscriptions
subscription.description: Recurring billing made simple with automated payments

q1.question: How long does it take to integrate?
q1.answer: Most merchants complete integration in under 2 hours with our simple API and SDKs.

q2.question: What are the fees?
q2.answer: We charge 1.5% per transaction with no hidden fees or monthly charges.

q3.question: Which cryptocurrencies do you support?
q3.answer: We support Bitcoin, Ethereum, USDC, USDT, and all major Stellar assets.

q4.question: How do settlements work?
q4.answer: You can choose instant settlement to your wallet or batch settlements on a schedule.

q5.question: Is it secure?
q5.answer: Yes, we use bank-grade encryption, multi-signature wallets, and comply with international security standards.

checkout.offlineMessage: You are offline. We will resume payment updates when your network reconnects.
checkout.notFoundDescription: The payment you are looking for does not exist or has been removed.
checkout.checkLink: Please check the payment link and try again.
checkout.confirmedDescription: Your payment has been successfully processed.
checkout.requestNew: Please request a new payment link from the merchant.
checkout.failedDescription: The payment could not be processed.
checkout.tryAgainOrSupport: Please try again or contact support if the problem persists.
checkout.partialDescription: Your payment of {paidAmount} {currency} was less than the expected {amount} {currency}.
checkout.contactMerchantResolve: Please contact the merchant to resolve the remaining balance.
checkout.overpaymentDescription: Your payment of {paidAmount} {currency} exceeded the expected {amount} {currency}.
checkout.contactMerchantExcess: Please contact the merchant regarding the excess amount.
checkout.memoDescription: This payment destination requires a memo/tag. Please include the memo exactly as shown, or your payment may not be credited.
checkout.step1: Scan the QR code above with your Stellar wallet app
checkout.step2: Confirm the amount and payment address match
checkout.step3: Complete the transaction in your wallet
checkout.step4: You will be automatically redirected after confirmation
